testcase.name: test_list_tutors

failure.message: AssertionError: assert (True and 11 == 8) + where True = isinstance([{'available': True, 'avatar': 'AC', 'bio': 'Built retrieval at a YC AI infra startup. Helps debug recall, chunking, and reranking.', 'id': 'tutor-aria', ...}, {'available': True, 'avatar': 'MP', 'bio': 'Shipped autonomous agents for two SaaS companies. Knows the failure modes by heart.', 'id': 'tutor-marcus', ...}, {'available': True, 'avatar': 'YT', 'bio': 'Trained 30+ models on Llama/Mistral. Will tell you when fine-tuning is the wrong answer.', 'id': 'tutor-yuki', ...}, {'available': True, 'avatar': 'RS', 'bio': 'Runs inference for a Fortune 500. vLLM, TGI, batching, autoscaling — all of it.', 'id': 'tutor-rohan', ...}, {'available': True, 'avatar': 'PI', 'bio': 'Applied scientist. Loves writing eval suites that actually catch regressions.', 'id': 'tutor-priya', ...}, {'available': True, 'avatar': 'DO', 'bio': 'Builds multi-agent systems for financial workflows. Strong on observability.', 'id': 'tutor-david', ...}, ...], list) + and 11 = len([{'available': True, 'avatar': 'AC', 'bio': 'Built retrieval at a YC AI infra startup. Helps debug recall, chunking, and reranking.', 'id': 'tutor-aria', ...}, {'available': True, 'avatar': 'MP', 'bio': 'Shipped autonomous agents for two SaaS companies. Knows the failure modes by heart.', 'id': 'tutor-marcus', ...}, {'available': True, 'avatar': 'YT', 'bio': 'Trained 30+ models on Llama/Mistral. Will tell you when fine-tuning is the wrong answer.', 'id': 'tutor-yuki', ...}, {'available': True, 'avatar': 'RS', 'bio': 'Runs inference for a Fortune 500. vLLM, TGI, batching, autoscaling — all of it.', 'id': 'tutor-rohan', ...}, {'available': True, 'avatar': 'PI', 'bio': 'Applied scientist. Loves writing eval suites that actually catch regressions.', 'id': 'tutor-priya', ...}, {'available': True, 'avatar': 'DO', 'bio': 'Builds multi-agent systems for financial workflows. Strong on observability.', 'id': 'tutor-david', ...}, ...])

testcase.name: test_keyword_canned_reply[agent loop is stuck-planner is over-thinking]
